name: Urara
description: Kasugai Crow assigned to [Mitsuri Kanroji](https://anilist.co/character/136072). Wears a clover-shaped crown similar to Mitsuri's Nichirin Sword tsuba. Often appears to be nervous and fidgety, and is rumored to have a sweet tooth as a result of how often she has tea time with Mitsuri.
